headline: Bernstein Maintains Market Perform on W.W. Grainger, Raises Price Target to $1125
summary: Bernstein  analyst Connor Cerniglia   maintains W.W. Grainger (NYSE:GWW) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $1052 to $1125.
